name: Lunch in a Mug: Soup
recipeInstructions:
To serve: 2 tablespoons uncooked instant rice (optional), 3/4 cup water
In a small bowl, combine milk powder, creamer, bouillon granules, vegetable flakes, parsley flakes, savory, salt, onion powder, and pepper. Store in an airtight container for up to 6 months.
To make one serving of soup, place instant rice (Minute Rice) and 3 tablespoons dry soup mix in a microwave-safe mug. Place 3/4 cup water in a 1-cup measure and microwave on HIGH for 1 1/2 to 3 minutes or until it boils. Pour boiling water into the mug with rice and soup mix; stir. Cover with plastic wrap and let stand for 5 minutes or until rice is tender.
